title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones using small daily improvements.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical novel about following your dreams, listening to your heart, and discovering your personal legend.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A practical handbook of agile software craftsmanship focused on writing readable, maintainable, and clean code.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world, showing how deep concentration produces high-value results.
